title: CSM & Growth — 30-day test run
parties: Jesse Allan → Rich · RT Digital active book
headline: $2,500 guaranteed minimum · 16 Jul – 15 Aug

terms.label: Fixed fee, minimum
terms.detail: Guaranteed minimum for the 30-day period, regardless of the book. No base, no separate commission.

terms.label: How it's set
terms.detail: Of the ~$10,000 realistic active MRR being taken over.

terms.label: Term
terms.detail: Reviewed at month-end. 30-day exit either side.

notes: A floor, not a ceiling — doesn't drop if a client churns or runs off, and moves up if new clients land mid-month.
Recurring revenue only. No setup-fee percentage this round; the new offer isn't defined yet, so there's nothing to bill against.
Billed to AT Network or RT Digital, whichever suits cash flow. Invoiced at the end of the 30 days.
covered: Retention across the active book — check-in cadence, health reads, correct staging, saving at-risk clients.
Oversight of the RT Digital / Trade AI ads already running.
The live revenue and commission dashboard.
separate: New offers or campaigns — Google Ads product, outbound sequences, landing pages, creative.
Build or dev work — websites, funnels, new CRM or workflow builds.
Marketing for AT Network or any entity outside the RT Digital active book.
Rolling out new products to partners (e.g. white-label CRM).
